source.data:
Feature: NUPAKACHI Shop Checkout Validation and Purchase Flows

  Background:
    Given I am on the NUPAKACHI Shop homepage
    And I sign in with user "thuanphat" and password "123456"
    And I navigate to the products section
    And I select the first product and add it to the cart
    And I navigate to the checkout page

  @UIUX
  Scenario: TC_UI_01 - Verify order button loading state
    When I fill in the checkout form with valid details
    And I click on the Place Order button
    Then the Place Order button should display a loading spinner and become disabled

  @UIUX
  Scenario: TC_UI_02 - Autofill account credentials in checkout
    Then the checkout fields for Name, Phone, and Address should be auto-filled with stored user details

  @UIUX
  Scenario: TC_UI_03 - Verify form inputs persist on window resize or tab switch
    When I enter "Nguyễn Văn Test" as Full Name
    And I switch tabs or minimize the window and return
    Then the Full Name input field should still contain "Nguyễn Văn Test"

  @UIUX
  Scenario: TC_UI_05 - Auto focus on error field on invalid submit
    When I leave the checkout form fields blank
    And I click on the Place Order button
    Then the browser cursor should automatically focus on the first invalid field

  @UIUX
  Scenario: TC_UI_06 - Check placeholder descriptions on form fields
    Then each input field should display a clear helper placeholder description inside it

  @UIUX
  Scenario: TC_UI_07 - Validation message font colors
    When I enter "invalid_phone" as Phone
    And I click on the Place Order button
    Then the validation error text below the input field should be styled in red color

  @UIUX
  Scenario: TC_UI_08 - Form navigation order using Tab key
    When I focus on the Full Name input field
    And I press the Tab key repeatedly
    Then the cursor focus should shift sequentially from top-to-bottom and left-to-right

  @Validation
  Scenario Outline: Check form validation warnings
    When I enter "<name>" in the Full Name field
    And I enter "<email>" in the Email field
    And I enter "<phone>" in the Phone field
    And I enter "<address>" in the Address field
    And I click on the Place Order button
    Then I should see the error warning message "<expectedError>"

    Examples:
      | name      | email          | phone       | address  | expectedError                          |
      |           |                |             |          | Vui lòng nhập đầy đủ thông tin         |
      | Nguyễn A  | test@gmail.com | 090123abcd  | Hà Nội   | SĐT không hợp lệ                       |
      | Nguyễn A  | test@gmail.com | 09012345    | Hà Nội   | SĐT phải có đủ 10 chữ số                |
      | Nguyễn A  | test@gmail.com | 8901234567  | Hà Nội   | SĐT phải bắt đầu bằng số 0             |
      | Nguyễn A  | nguyenvana.com | 0901234567  | Hà Nội   | Email không hợp lệ                     |
      | Nguyễn A  | nguyễ@gma.com  | 0901234567  | Hà Nội   | Email không được chứa tiếng Việt có dấu |
      |   abc     | test@gmail.com | 0901234567  |   xyz    | Không được để trống Họ Tên             |

  @Validation
  Scenario: TC_VAL_16 - Verify error on non-existent discount voucher
    When I enter "NONEXISTENTCODE" as Voucher Code
    And I click on Apply Voucher button
    Then I should see the error "mã giảm giá không tồn tại"

  @Validation
  Scenario: TC_VAL_17 - Verify error on expired discount voucher
    When I enter "EXPIRED2025" as Voucher Code
    And I click on Apply Voucher button
    Then I should see the error "mã giảm giá đã hết hạn"

  @Validation
  Scenario: TC_VAL_19 - Reset quantity on text input
    When I navigate to the product detail view
    And I enter "abc" in the quantity field
    Then the quantity value should automatically reset to 1

  @Functional
  Scenario: TC_FUN_01 - Checkout success via Cash on Delivery
    When I fill in the checkout form with valid details
    And I select COD as the payment method
    And I click on the Place Order button
    Then I should be redirected to the order success page with a generated invoice code

  @Functional
  Scenario: TC_FUN_10 - Visa payment redirection
    When I fill in the checkout form with valid details
    And I select Visa as the payment method
    And I click on the Place Order button
    Then I should be redirected to the Visa gateway secure verification page

  @Functional
  Scenario: TC_FUN_11 - MoMo payment redirection
    When I fill in the checkout form with valid details
    And I select MoMo as the payment method
    And I click on the Place Order button
    Then I should be redirected to the MoMo QR invoice transaction page

  @Interruption
  Scenario: TC_INT_01 - Handle double click checkout actions
    When I double-click the Place Order button 5 times rapidly
    Then only 1 order transaction request should be executed by the system

  @Interruption
  Scenario: TC_INT_03 - Browser Back action after payment success
    When I complete the payment checkout successfully
    And I press the browser Back button
    Then I should be navigated to the home page without triggering duplicate order creation

  @Interruption
  Scenario: TC_INT_08 - Simultaneous multi-tab checkout session deletion
    When I open the checkout form in Tab 1
    And I clear the cart in Tab 2
    And I return to Tab 1 and submit the checkout form
    Then the system should refuse checkout and display "giỏ hàng trống" error

  @Security
  Scenario: TC_SEC_01 - Clean XSS payload inputs on checkout fields
    When I enter "<script>alert('xss')</script>" in the Full Name field
    And I click on the Place Order button
    Then the name field value should be HTML-encoded in the database order transaction

feature.name: NUPAKACHI Shop Checkout Validation and Purchase Flows

steps.text: I am on the NUPAKACHI Shop homepage
I sign in with user "thuanphat" and password "123456"
I navigate to the products section
I select the first product and add it to the cart
I navigate to the checkout page

scenario.name: TC_UI_01 - Verify order button loading state

steps.text: I fill in the checkout form with valid details
I click on the Place Order button
the Place Order button should display a loading spinner and become disabled

scenario.name: TC_UI_02 - Autofill account credentials in checkout

steps.text: the checkout fields for Name, Phone, and Address should be auto-filled with stored user details

scenario.name: TC_UI_03 - Verify form inputs persist on window resize or tab switch

steps.text: I enter "Nguyễn Văn Test" as Full Name
I switch tabs or minimize the window and return
the Full Name input field should still contain "Nguyễn Văn Test"

scenario.name: TC_UI_05 - Auto focus on error field on invalid submit

steps.text: I leave the checkout form fields blank
I click on the Place Order button
the browser cursor should automatically focus on the first invalid field

scenario.name: TC_UI_06 - Check placeholder descriptions on form fields

steps.text: each input field should display a clear helper placeholder description inside it
I enter "invalid_phone" as Phone
I click on the Place Order button
the validation error text below the input field should be styled in red color

scenario.name: TC_UI_08 - Form navigation order using Tab key

steps.text: I focus on the Full Name input field
I press the Tab key repeatedly
the cursor focus should shift sequentially from top-to-bottom and left-to-right
I enter "<name>" in the Full Name field
I enter "<email>" in the Email field
I enter "<phone>" in the Phone field
I enter "<address>" in the Address field
I click on the Place Order button
I should see the error warning message "<expectedError>"

cells.value: Vui lòng nhập đầy đủ thông tin
SĐT phải có đủ 10 chữ số
SĐT phải bắt đầu bằng số 0
Email không được chứa tiếng Việt có dấu
Không được để trống Họ Tên

scenario.name: TC_VAL_16 - Verify error on non-existent discount voucher

steps.text: I enter "NONEXISTENTCODE" as Voucher Code
I click on Apply Voucher button
I should see the error "mã giảm giá không tồn tại"

scenario.name: TC_VAL_17 - Verify error on expired discount voucher

steps.text: I enter "EXPIRED2025" as Voucher Code
I click on Apply Voucher button
I should see the error "mã giảm giá đã hết hạn"

scenario.name: TC_VAL_19 - Reset quantity on text input

steps.text: I navigate to the product detail view
I enter "abc" in the quantity field
the quantity value should automatically reset to 1

scenario.name: TC_FUN_01 - Checkout success via Cash on Delivery

steps.text: I fill in the checkout form with valid details
I select COD as the payment method
I click on the Place Order button
I should be redirected to the order success page with a generated invoice code
I fill in the checkout form with valid details
I select Visa as the payment method
I click on the Place Order button
I should be redirected to the Visa gateway secure verification page
I fill in the checkout form with valid details
I select MoMo as the payment method
I click on the Place Order button
I should be redirected to the MoMo QR invoice transaction page

scenario.name: TC_INT_01 - Handle double click checkout actions

steps.text: I double-click the Place Order button 5 times rapidly
only 1 order transaction request should be executed by the system

scenario.name: TC_INT_03 - Browser Back action after payment success

steps.text: I complete the payment checkout successfully
I press the browser Back button
I should be navigated to the home page without triggering duplicate order creation

scenario.name: TC_INT_08 - Simultaneous multi-tab checkout session deletion

steps.text: I open the checkout form in Tab 1
I clear the cart in Tab 2
I return to Tab 1 and submit the checkout form
the system should refuse checkout and display "giỏ hàng trống" error

scenario.name: TC_SEC_01 - Clean XSS payload inputs on checkout fields

steps.text: I enter "<script>alert('xss')</script>" in the Full Name field
I click on the Place Order button
the name field value should be HTML-encoded in the database order transaction
